# mijnhost Provider

Interact with mijn.host to manage DNS records for your domains.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The mijn.host API key. Can also be set via the MIJNHOST_API_KEY environment variable.
